step_rationale: Ischemic injury and metabolic stress marker; phospholipid precursor.
mechanism: Inositol metabolism perturbation reflects myocardial ischemic stress and membrane phospholipid turnover during cardiac injury.

references.title: Unbiased metabolomics screening for potential biomarkers in patients with In-stent restenosis post percutaneous coronary intervention.
Plasma myo-inositol elevation in heart failure: clinical implications and prognostic significance. Results from the BElgian and CAnadian MEtabolomics in HFpEF (BECAME-HF) research project.
Metabolomic analysis of serum and myocardium in compensated heart failure after myocardial infarction.
